mentions.note: Up just over 200% in 2025 despite 20% pullback from Oct peak. Younger generation learning to invest on platform; inheriting $100T+ from boomers. Long-term structural tailwind. Short-term tied to crypto volatility.
Captured young retail cohort mindset; sticky product resonates with millennial investors.
Stock closely aligned with Bitcoin price; Bitcoin lost luster after decline while dollar weakened; not reliable store of value or inflation hedge; becoming toxic repository.
Trading 30x earnings with too much crypto revenue exposure; too volatile, trades like Bitcoin; need more equities/bonds balance before considering.

Sixth-worst performer (−24%); reported miserable quarter with weak options/crypto trading; down 17% over two sessions; hostage to crypto volatility; prefers SoFi for tech-focused retail appeal but turning bullish on crypto as potential catalyst.
Retail trading platform surged on risk-on sentiment and Bitcoin strength. Highest-risk stocks leading rally as investors return to tried-and-true momentum trades.
Caller Cheryl (entry 145): forget where you bought; buy at 80, very big at 70; question is where to buy now, not where to get back to.
Still room to go down; trades at 28x earnings vs. Morgan Stanley 14x; doesn't have same sticky money as MS. Big buyback but valuation stretched. Wait for war resolution.
Should have terrific quarter given market volatility. Waiting for company to attract more serious investors beyond traders.
